payload.claim_text: Under this contract, Masabi will continue to provide (1) core platform services that are currently deployed and in use; (2) new platform capabilities that support OMNY fare media for payment; and (3) new platform capabilities that support the potential for joint (Railroad and NYC Transit) ticket sales. Additionally, Masabi will create an SDK that allows the MTA to (1) build a new onboard sales and validation device; (2) provide customer discounts based on ride history; and (3) provide one-MTA login (Single Sign-On) for customers.
payload.description: Scope of work under Masabi contract 16022

payload.claim_text: S&B will install new state-of-the-art Ticket Vending Machines/Ticket Office Machines (TVMs/TOMs), upgrade back-office software for device management and compliance to Payment Card Industry Data Security Standards (PCI DSS) and cybersecurity requirements, decommission and remove old machines, and provide life cycle maintenance.
payload.description: Scope of work under Scheidt & Bachmann contract

payload.claim_text: Contract will now include a 0.55 percent transaction fee, reduced from 1.25 percent under the prior contract
payload.description: Reduction in Masabi transaction fee

payload.claim_text: This disproportionately impacts customers without mobile devices, may increase on-board sales, slow down train crews, and potentially increase fare evasion.
payload.description: Impact of TVM/TOM service disruption on equity and operations

payload.claim_text: S&B has confirmed that MTA has been provided with the best discounts offered compared to any of their other government customers.
payload.description: S&B pricing commitment to MTA

records.display_name: Masabi pricing deemed fair and reasonable

payload.claim_text: LIRR and MNR project leads, and MTA Procurement have deemed pricing provided by Masabi to be fair and reasonable.
payload.description: Pricing fairness determination for Masabi contract

records.display_name: Scheidt & Bachmann Fare Collection System Replacement

description: Noncompetitive miscellaneous service contract to Scheidt & Bachmann USA to replace and upgrade fare collection solution for LIRR and MNR, including new TVMs/TOMs, back-office software, PCI DSS compliance

Noncompetitive contract to Scheidt & Bachmann USA to replace and upgrade the fare collection solution for LIRR and MNR. 5.5-year base plus two 5-year options. Total estimated value $134,134,782. Includes 471 TVMs and 114 TOMs.

payload.description: Noncompetitive miscellaneous service contract to Scheidt & Bachmann USA to replace and upgrade fare collection solution for LIRR and MNR, including new TVMs/TOMs, back-office software, PCI DSS compliance
payload.project_name: Fare Collection System for LIRR and MNR

description: Noncompetitive miscellaneous service contract to Masabi, LLC to continue administering the Mobile Ticketing Program for LIRR and MNR with OMNY integration

Noncompetitive miscellaneous service contract to Masabi LLC to continue administering the Mobile Ticketing Program for LIRR and MNR via MTA TrainTime. Seven-year base plus one 5-year option. Total estimated value $97,069,659.
